productDisplayName: Fastrack Women Core Analog Steel Black Watch
description: Sleek and stylish to the hilt, this fastrack analog wrist watch is a great buy for those who enjoy performance and style. With excellent touches and comfort, this watch makes for an excellent daily wear.Case diameter: 20 mmCase thickness: 5 mmDial shape: Rectangular Rectangular metallic case with a fixed bezel in a rectangular shape covering the lower half of the casing for added durability, style and comfort Steel strap with a butterfly clasp Black dial with grey lines in varying thickness running along its length on one half, and brand name printed across the length of the other half at 9 o& rsquo clock position Quartz movement of time display Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance at 30 meters, allowing you to use it even when swimming
